name: product-designer
description: Senior product designer agent with 14 specialized skills covering UI/UX design, visual design, research, strategy, microinteractions, business knowledge, AI design lifecycle, and more. Includes ui-ux-pro-max (50+ styles, 161 palettes, 57 font pairings), a new project bootstrap protocol that asks clarifying questions and scaffolds tokens/icons/components, automatic project state detection (MATURE/PARTIAL/NEW), and a rebuilt ux-design skill with 115 named rules and pre-delivery checklists.
